name: DevOps Toolbox
oneLine: Practitioner channel about Neovim, tmux, and the modern DevOps CLI workflow run by engineer Omerxx.
bio: DevOps Toolbox is hosted by Omer (Omerxx), a working DevOps engineer who publishes Friday tutorials on terminal-first workflows: Neovim, tmux, Zsh, Docker, Kubernetes, and infrastructure-as-code. The channel is heavy on dotfile walkthroughs and reproducible setups, with a companion GitHub (omerxx/devops-toolbox) hosting his configs. Style is hands-on screen-share with the host's terminal as the main subject.
style: Screen-share terminal tutorials around 10-20 minutes, focused on live config edits and live tool demos.
